mapper.select: SELECT PROGRM_FILE_NM AS "progrmFileNm" , PROGRM_STRE_PATH AS "progrmStrePath" , PROGRM_KOREAN_NM AS "progrmKoreanNm" , PROGRM_DC AS "progrmDc" , URL AS "URL" FROM LET_TN_PROGRM_LIST WHERE PROGRM_KOREAN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "totcnt" FROM LET_TN_PROGRM_LIST WHERE PROGRM_KOREAN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

SELECT PROGRM_FILE_NM AS "progrmFileNm" , PROGRM_STRE_PATH AS "progrmStrePath" , PROGRM_KOREAN_NM AS "progrmKoreanNm" , PROGRM_DC AS "progrmDc" , URL AS "URL" FROM LET_TN_PROGRM_LIST WHERE PROGRM_FILE_NM = #{searchKeyword}
